ocr_findings.description: The SLA sample document shown as a side figure (バージョン2.0, 令和2年6月28日, 株式会社テクテク) is captured inline at the bottom of the OCR text rather than as a positioned sidebar. Cosmetic layout difference only; all text is present.

reviewer_notes: Page covers SLA definition and explanation with a sidebar sample document. All main body text is accurately captured including the 試験にはコレが出る box bullet points and the 略語を覚える section. The SLA document figure text is inlined rather than positioned as a sidebar, but content is complete.
